title: Hollywood Barn Dance
writer: Bernard B. Ray, Dorothea Knox Martin
actors: Ernest Tubb, Lori Talbott, The Texas Troubadours
plot: Based on and built around the west coast radio program, "The Hollywood Barn Dance", although no members of the 1947 cast of the program are in the film, but the better-known (on a national scale) Ernest Tubb and His Texas Troubado...
